hero.title: Sokołek Studio
hero.subtitle: Technology and design, all in one place.
hero.description: We are an independent technology studio from Poznań, bringing engineering and creativity together. With us, you can build your brand from the ground up - from visual identity to advanced digital systems. We design with intention. We make artificial intelligence easier to understand, using it responsibly and only where it genuinely makes sense. We believe in technology that matters and makes everyday work easier.

services.label: Services
services.heading: Small studio. Full attention.
services.description: Your brand, website, technology and communication should all speak the same language. That is why we look at your business as a whole and shape the scope around what it actually needs.

items.title: AI
items.description: We build tools that simplify working with documents, knowledge and repetitive processes.

items.title: Web Design
items.description: We design refined websites and digital products that look and sound like your brand.

items.title: Branding
items.description: We build brands - from the initial idea and strategy to naming, visual identity and tone of voice.

items.title: Content
items.description: We create social media content - photography, video and copywriting - that completes a consistent brand image.

engineeringFoundation.label: Technology Expertise
engineeringFoundation.heading: Experience you can dependend on.
engineeringFoundation.description: The technology side of Sokołek Studio is led by Maksymilian Sokołek, a senior software engineer with nearly six years of experience building AI systems, web applications and cloud architectures. He currently develops AI systems at Brahma AI. Previously, he designed and delivered solutions for startups and global companies across the healthcare, chemical, advertising, semiconductor and financial industries.

pillars.title: AI Platform for Medical Documentation
pillars.outcome: Designed and built an application for working with medical documentation and knowledge from the ground up - from cloud architecture and AI model integrations to the user interface and deployment process.

pillars.title: AI Agent System for Advertising
pillars.outcome: Built an agentic system capable of planning and executing multi-step tasks, working with different AI models and passing structured results between services.

pillars.title: MLOps Infrastructure for the Semiconductor Industry
pillars.outcome: Designed and implemented a production MLOps environment based on Kubernetes that standardised machine learning workflows and streamlined model development and deployment across a global engineering organisation.

pillars.title: Data Architecture for the Banking Sector
pillars.outcome: Built pipelines that analysed data and information that supported the maintenance of a global ATM infrastructure.

pillars.title: Knowledge Platform for the Chemical Industry
pillars.outcome: Designed a platform that processed approximately 100,000 technical PDF documents, structured the data they contained and prepared it for search and use by AI-powered tools.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.heading: A digital space for a place built with passion.

dogTok.title: DOG TOK
dogTok.subtitle: DOG TOK - Szkoleniowy Raj
dogTok.summary: We organised DOG TOK's extensive offering into a clear and intuitive structure. We designed a website that captures the atmosphere of the place, makes key information easy to find and guides visitors through workshops, camps, accommodation and the events calendar.

sectionOne.heading: A little about us, hey!
sectionOne.description: The technical co-founder of the studio. He has spent years building software and AI systems for startups and large companies. He combines solid engineering experience with a strong curiosity for new technology, without implementing it just for the sake of it. He likes simple solutions, clean code and projects refined down to the smallest detail.

sectionTwo.description: The creative co-founder of the studio. She combines experience in PR and communication with photography, editing and social media. She has a strong eye for visuals, a feel for trends and knows how to translate a brand's character into content. She makes sure everything feels consistent, natural and simply looks good.

contact.description: Tell us about your business, idea or challenge. Together, we will work out what you actually need and how we can turn it into a thoughtfully designed solution.

cookieConsent.label: Cookie consent
cookieConsent.heading: Can we use analytics cookies?
cookieConsent.description: We use Google Analytics to better understand how visitors use our website.
